ddls:
CREATE TABLE "parts" (
  "part_number" TEXT /* Unique identifier for each battery part */,
  "capacity_mAh" INTEGER /* Capacity of the battery part in milliampere-hours (mAh) */,
  "c_rate" TEXT /* Charge rate of the battery part (1C, 2C, etc.) */,
  "length_mm" REAL /* Length of the battery part in millimeters */,
  "width_mm" REAL /* Width of the battery part in millimeters */,
  "thickness_mm" REAL /* Thickness of the battery part in millimeters */,
  "chemistry" TEXT /* Chemistry of the battery part (e.g., lithium-ion, lead-acid, etc.) */,
  "voltage" REAL /* Nominal voltage of the battery part */,
  "weight" REAL /* Weight of the battery part in grams */,
  "max_charge_voltage" REAL /* Maximum charge voltage of the battery part */,
  "max_discharge_current" REAL /* Maximum discharge current of the battery part */,
  "cycle_life" INTEGER /* Expected cycle life of the battery part */,
  "self_discharge_rate" REAL /* Self-discharge rate of the battery part per month */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("part_number")
)

CREATE TABLE "manufacturing_sites" (
  "site_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each manufacturing site */,
  "site_name" TEXT /* Name of the site */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the site */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Contact email for inquiries about the site */,
  "address" TEXT /* Physical address of the manufacturing site */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the manufacturing site */,
  "website" TEXT /* Website of the manufacturing site */,
  "certifications" TEXT /* Certifications held by the manufacturing site (e.g., ISO 9001, ISO 14001, etc.) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("site_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "inventory" (
  "inventory_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each inventory record */,
  "part_number" TEXT /* Reference to the battery part */,
  "site_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the manufacturing site */,
  "quantity" INTEGER /* Quantity of the battery part in stock */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Date and time when the inventory level was last updated */,
  "reorder_point" INTEGER /* Reorder point for the battery part */,
  "reorder_quantity" INTEGER /* Reorder quantity for the battery part */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("inventory_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_inventory_site_id FOREIGN KEY ("site_id") REFERENCES manufacturing_sites ("site_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_inventory_part_number FOREIGN KEY ("part_number") REFERENCES parts ("part_number")
)

CREATE TABLE "production" (
  "production_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each production record */,
  "part_number" TEXT /* Reference to the battery part */,
  "site_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the manufacturing site */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the production process */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the production process */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the production process (e.g., in progress, completed) */,
  "shift_id" INTEGER /* ID of the production shift */,
  "operator_id" INTEGER /* ID of the production operator */,
  "production_notes" TEXT /* Notes about the production process */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("production_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_production_part_number FOREIGN KEY ("part_number") REFERENCES parts ("part_number"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_production_site_id FOREIGN KEY ("site_id") REFERENCES manufacturing_sites ("site_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "demand_forecast" (
  "forecast_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each demand forecast record */,
  "part_number" TEXT /* Reference to the battery part */,
  "forecast_date" TEXT /* Date of the forecast */,
  "predicted_demand" INTEGER /* Predicted demand for the battery part */,
  "forecast_model" TEXT /* Model used to generate the demand forecast */,
  "confidence_level" REAL /* Confidence level of the demand forecast */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Notes about the demand forecast */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("forecast_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_demand_forecast_part_number FOREIGN KEY ("part_number") REFERENCES parts ("part_number")
)

CREATE TABLE "supply_chain" (
  "supply_chain_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each supply chain record */,
  "part_number" TEXT /* Reference to the battery part */,
  "supplier_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the supplier */,
  "delivery_date" TEXT /* Delivery date of the battery part */,
  "quantity" INTEGER /* Quantity of the battery part to be delivered */,
  "supplier_lead_time" INTEGER /* Lead time of the supplier */,
  "shipping_method" TEXT /* Shipping method used by the supplier */,
  "delivery_notes" TEXT /* Notes about the delivery */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("supply_chain_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_supply_chain_supplier_id FOREIGN KEY ("supplier_id") REFERENCES suppliers ("supplier_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_supply_chain_part_number FOREIGN KEY ("part_number") REFERENCES parts ("part_number")
)

CREATE TABLE "suppliers" (
  "supplier_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each supplier */,
  "supplier_name" TEXT /* Name of the supplier */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Contact email for the supplier */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the supplier */,
  "supplier_type" TEXT /* Type of supplier (e.g., contract manufacturer, component supplier, etc.) */,
  "payment_terms" TEXT /* Payment terms of the supplier */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("supplier_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "quality_control" (
  "qc_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each quality control record */,
  "part_number" TEXT /* Reference to the battery part */,
  "site_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the manufacturing site */,
  "inspection_date" TEXT /* Date of the quality control inspection */,
  "result" TEXT /* Result of the quality control inspection (e.g., passed, failed) */,
  "inspection_type" TEXT /* Type of inspection performed */,
  "defect_rate" REAL /* Defect rate of the battery part */,
  "test_results" TEXT /* Results of the quality control tests */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("qc_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_quality_control_part_number FOREIGN KEY ("part_number") REFERENCES parts ("part_number"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_quality_control_site_id FOREIGN KEY ("site_id") REFERENCES manufacturing_sites ("site_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "orders" (
  "order_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each order */,
  "part_number" TEXT /* Reference to the battery part */,
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the customer */,
  "order_date" TEXT /* Date of the order */,
  "quantity" INTEGER /* Quantity of the battery part ordered */,
  "sales_channel" TEXT /* Sales channel used to receive the order */,
  "order_status" TEXT /* Status of the order */,
  "payment_status" TEXT /* Payment status of the order */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("order_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_orders_part_number FOREIGN KEY ("part_number") REFERENCES parts ("part_number"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_orders_customer_id FOREIGN KEY ("customer_id") REFERENCES customers ("customer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "customers" (
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each customer */,
  "customer_name" TEXT /* Name of the customer */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Contact email for the customer */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the customer */,
  "customer_type" TEXT /* Type of customer (e.g., OEM, distributor, etc.) */,
  "account_manager" TEXT /* Account manager assigned to the customer */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("customer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "shipping" (
  "shipping_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each shipping record */,
  "order_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the order */,
  "shipping_date" TEXT /* Date the battery parts were shipped */,
  "delivery_date" TEXT /* Expected delivery date of the battery parts */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the shipping process (e.g., in transit, delivered) */,
  "shipping_carrier" TEXT /* Shipping carrier used */,
  "tracking_number" TEXT /* Tracking number of the shipment */,
  "shipping_cost" REAL /* Cost of shipping */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("shipping_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_shipping_order_id FOREIGN KEY ("order_id") REFERENCES orders ("order_id")
)
